description: A full-stack AI/ML web application designed to automatically fetch and synthesize product reviews into actionable insights using Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Machine Learning. Provides a responsive data visualization dashboard and an interactive AI sandbox to analyze sentiment.

workflow.step_1_data_generation: The 'ml/data_gen.py' script generates synthetic product review datasets covering categories like Electronics, Home Appliances, etc.
workflow.step_2_machine_learning: The 'ml/train.py' pipeline parses raw text into numerical embeddings using Scikit-Learn TF-IDF Vectorizer, and trains a Logistic Regression model to output sentiment evaluation (Positive, Negative, Neutral).
workflow.step_3_backend_api: The FastAPI backend ('backend/main.py') exposes endpoints that group product sentiments into categorical structures, extracts top loved interactions and critical pain points, and serves model predictions to the API.
workflow.step_4_frontend_dashboard: The React/Vite frontend ('frontend/src/App.jsx') fetches insights from the backend and produces an interactive glassmorphic dashboard showcasing macro metrics, charts (Recharts), and an AI lab to test manual text sentiment.

backend/.main.py: FastAPI server and API routes logic connecting to ML endpoints.

ml/.train.py: ML model training and vectorizer creation script.

frontend/.tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration for custom UI requirements.

src/.index.css: Core Tailwind CSS with Mesh Gradients.
src/.App.jsx: The main React component comprising the entire dashboard app.
